how should I start investing what is the first step ?

To start investing in stocks in Pakistan, follow these steps: (1) Choose a SECP-registered broker - you can find a list on the PSX website. (2) Open a trading account with the broker - you will need your CNIC, bank account details, and a recent photograph. (3) Complete KYC (Know Your Customer) verification. (4) Get a UIN (Unique Identification Number) from NCCPL. (5) Open a CDC sub-account for holding your shares electronically.

Sources: stocksense_knowledge_base.txt

We have a complete learning module with courses on stock market basics, financial statements, technical analysis, and more!

Go to the Learn section in the app to start your courses. Each course has reading material, practice questions, and a quiz.

You can access it here: /learn

Want me to explain any stock market concept right here? Just ask!

A bubble occurs when stock prices rise far above their fundamental values driven by speculative enthusiasm rather than earnings growth. Bubbles are characterized by high P/E ratios, widespread media coverage, retail investor enthusiasm, and the belief that prices can only go up. Bubbles always eventually burst, causing severe market corrections.

Sources: PSX_Complete_QA_Guide.pdf
